headlines.title: Iran Says Its Reviewing 14-Point US Proposal to End the War
headlines.description: An American fighter jet attacked an Iranian tanker in the Gulf of Oman as it tried to break through the U.S. military blockade and make its way to an Iranian port, according to the U.S. Central Command. It comes as Iran says it’s deliberating a response to what the Wall Street Journal describes as a one page, 14-point U.S. proposal to end the war. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY from Jerusalem.

headlines.title: Kamala Harris wants the DNC to release its autopsy report of the 2024 campaign
headlines.description: Amid turmoil over the party’s future, Kamala Harris has been privately sounding out confidants about her own prospects.

headlines.title: Question on state’s sanctuary law turned into personal jabs during California gubernatorial debate
headlines.description: In the race to become California’s next governor, candidates were asked about the state’s law restricting local authorities from cooperating with federal law enforcement, with remarks at times becoming heated between the participants.

headlines.title: Indiana Republicans who lost their jobs after bucking Trump have ‘zero regrets’
headlines.description: Three state senators who were defeated in Tuesday’s primary told NBC News they haven’t changed their minds about the redistricting vote that drew Trump’s ire.

headlines.title: Democrats keep control of Michigan state Senate after special election win
headlines.description: Democrat Chedrick Greene has won a special state Senate election in Michigan, NBC News projects, ensuring his party will keep control of the closely divided chamber in a key battleground state

headlines.title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins GOP nomination for governor in Ohio
headlines.description: Businessman Vivek Ramaswamy has won Ohio’s Republican primary for governor, NBC News projects, advancing to what could be an expensive and competitive general election with Democrat Amy Acton in a state that has been brutal for Democrats in recent elections.

headlines.title: Indiana Republicans who lost their jobs after bucking Trump have ‘zero regrets’
headlines.description: Three state senators who were defeated in Tuesday’s primary told NBC News they haven’t changed their minds about the redistricting vote that drew Trump’s ire.

headlines.title: Video shows captain reporting first death on cruise ship affected by hantavirus
headlines.description: Video shows the captain of a cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak informing passengers on April 12 that one person had died on board, saying the death was believed to be due to natural causes and was not infectious.

headlines.title: Florida surgeon who removed wrong organ says he is ‘forever traumatized’ by patient’s death
headlines.description: Thomas Shaknovsky said in a deposition in November that he believed he was removing 70-year-old William Bryan’s spleen, not his liver.

headlines.title: Alleged Suicide Note From Jeffrey Epstein is Released by Judge
headlines.description: A possible suicide note from convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein has now been publicly revealed for the first time. The handwritten text spans roughly half a page and has not been authenticated by NBC News. It was not previously released in the so-called Epstein files by the Department of Justice and only became public after Epstein’s former cellmate, Nicholas Tartaglione, said he found it in a book in the cell they shared in 2019 as Epstein awaited trial on sex trafficking charges. NBC’s

headlines.title: Marco Rubio Meets With Pope Leo XIV Over Iran War and Cuba
headlines.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is meeting with Pope Leo XIV in the Apostolic Palace at the Vatican and the State Department says the conversations will include the situation in the Middle East and mutual interests in the Western Hemisphere. It comes after a series of tense exchanges between President Donald Trump and the pontiff over the Iran war. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: A new federal bill aims to protect pregnant women held in prisons and jails
headlines.description: The proposed legislation follows an investigation by Bloomberg Law and NBC News that found mistreatment of pregnant women in local jails.
